key_insight: PEFT should be evaluated by balancing adaptation for task-specific performance and retaining general capabilities.
engineering_relevance: Understanding the stability-plasticity dilemma is crucial for improving large language model performance in engineering applications.
method: Introduce the PEFT-Arena benchmark for evaluating performance and capability retention.
Analyze PEFT updates using weight space spectral analysis and activation space retention metrics.
Present case studies for post-hoc improvement through path-wise rewinding.
evidence_signal: Distinct stability-plasticity profiles were identified across different PEFT methods under similar parameter budgets.
watch_item: Final checkpoints may overshoot optimal retention points, necessitating careful adjustment.
paper_title: PEFT-Arena: Understanding Parameter-Efficient Finetuning from a Stability-Plasticity Perspective
